3133120.name: Minesweeper Sonar
3133120.description:
An Even Tenser Minesweeper Experience!


Defend against the enemy missiles by solving the minesweeper grid, if completed successfully, the missile will explode causing nearby damage and currency will be earned, if half solved, when the missile hits your boat, besides taking damage, you will only earn a portion of the currency, both are proportionate to how well the grid was solved, but make a mistake and click on a mine, the grid will do full damage and no currency will be earned.



To attack the enemy or repair your boat, you will have to look away from the incoming missiles, pay attention to the sound cues to make sure you are using your time and resources wisely.

Game Modes:

Story mode
Complete increasingly harder levels and find who is behind the attacks.

99999 mode
Battle against a ship with 99999 HP, it's not a matter of "how fast can defeat it?" it's a matter of "how long can you survive?".

Custom mode
Create your own level, chose the missile types and their speed, the time between missiles spawns and the player/enemy HP.
Share levels with your friends to see who is the best minesweeper player, levels can be copied and pasted!



Static mode
Practice your skills on non moving missiles, chose a missile type and take your time to solve it.

Extras:


  • Enjoy the game at your own pace by altering the speed of the game, from half speed (0.5x) to triple speed (3.0x).
  • The ability to "Chord" is always available using "Mouse 3/Middle Mouse" Button, but there is also option to use a secondary keyboard key that is programmable to a key of your choosing.
  • Don't wait for the next missile to appear, click and hold the "fast forward button" to temporarily increase the speed of the game.
  • When in a tight spot, use "Radius Blast", this has the ability to create an explosions blast, but unlike the one created from destroyed missiles (when a grid is correctly solved) that only has 50% change to reveal non-bomb and non-flagged tiles, the "Radius Blast" has 100% change to reveal them!
3133120.supported_languages: 英语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙
